title: UI/UX Designer
description: Job Type: Permanent \- Full Time Location: Dublin, Ireland Job Category: Marketing **Job Description** Where will your career take you next? Let’s find out together. At Zurich Cover\-More, we’re proud to be one of the world’s leading travel insurance and assistance providers. Each year, we protect more than 20 million travellers worldwide, making sure we’re there every step of their journey with proactive care, personalised cover and specialist support. Zurich Cover\-More partners with many of the world’s best\-known brands – think major airlines, travel giants, top banks, credit card providers, and large retailers – to deliver more care, more cover, for all. Launched in December 2024, Zurich Cover\-More is the global travel brand of Zurich Insurance Group, one of the world’s leading multi\-line insurers. Our family of customer\-facing brands includes trusted names like Travel Guard, Cover\-More Travel Insurance, Travelex Insurance, Universal Assistance, World Travel Protection, Freely, and Blue Insurance. Together, we’re redefining what it means to travel safely and with confidence. Whether it’s a long\-awaited holiday, a last\-minute business trip, or an unexpected detour, we deliver in the moments that matter. **About Cover\-More Europe** This role is part of our Cover\-More Europe team. Cover\-More Europe provides insurance solutions through a number of different customer\-facing brands across travel, car hire, specialty, and pet sectors in the United Kingdom, Ireland and the rest of Europe. For more than twenty years, we have been delivering insurance policies through our distribution partnerships. We know what is important to our partners, and we deliver simple and seamless customer experiences based on our genuine commitment to protection and care. **What You’ll Be Doing** In this role you will… * Assist and occasionally lead in the design process for new and existing features, from ideation through to final implementation, ensuring alignment with business goals and user needs. * Create user\-centric designs by understanding business requirements, user feedback, and technical limitations. * Assist and occasionally lead with developing wireframes, prototypes, user flows, and highfidelity mock\-ups that clearly communicate design solutions. * Collaborate closely with product managers, marketing executives, IT, customer care, compliance and clients to iterate on designs and ensure smooth implementation of the user experience. * Conduct user research, including surveys, usability testing and experimentation to inform design decisions and validate design concepts. * Mentor and provide guidance to any junior designers that may join the business, helping them grow and improve their skillsets. * Stay up\-to\-date with industry trends and best practices, continuously refining design processes and methods. * Advocate for the importance of user experience across the organization and contribute to a user\-centric culture. * Reporting (Conversion reporting, Usability reporting, Usability research, Split testing, multi\-variant testing and analysis, Revenue impacts/opportunity analysis, Accessibility scoring and Ad\-hoc reporting) What skills and experience you’ll bring on this journey: * 5\+ years’ experience as a UX/UI Designer or similar role * Familiarity with tracking solutions such as GA4, VWO and Hotjar * Hand\-on knowledge of design tools, preferably Figma * Experienced in HTML design * Strong aesthetic skills with the ability to combine various colours, fonts, and layouts * Experience of creating responsive webpages * Experience of designing e\-commerce journeys / web\-shops * Experience of designing logos, graphic and other digital assets * Ability to meet deadlines and collaborate with a teamGood understanding of the technical foundations upon which websites are built (HTML, CSS, JavaScript) is preferable, but not essential * Experience of running usability testing, using both quantitative and qualitative data Why you’ll love working with us! We value optimism, caring, togetherness, reliability, results\-orientation, and forward\-thinking. We have more than 3000 employees worldwide. We are a global group of digital specialists, actuaries, marketers, doctors, nurses, case managers, claims specialists, finance experts, customer service and corporate services professionals. We share a global purpose to look after travellers, at every step of their journey. Job flexibility. We understand the importance of making sure that work fits into your life, not the other way around. Our hybrid approach ensures you can maintain work\-life balance with the flexibility of 3 days in the office and 2 days working from home, after an initial training period. Career growth. This is an extremely exciting time for us at Zurich Cover\-More, as we rapidly expand our business across the globe. We’re committed to helping our people thrive through a comprehensive onboarding experience, continuous professional development, and a supportive work environment that empowers growth at every stage of your career. Take the time you need, for you and your community. We encourage you to take the time you need when you need it. We offer regular annual and personal leave benefits along with anniversary leave, volunteer leave and a comprehensive paid parental leave scheme. Investing in your health and your future. We offer a competitive health insurance package with comprehensive mental health coverage, access to an Employee Assistance Program (EAP), and a pension scheme with employer contributions – helping you build a secure and healthy future. Diversity and inclusion. We respect who you are and thoroughly embrace diversity. Wherever life has taken you, we welcome you to bring your whole self to work. Just be you – because that’s exactly who we’re looking for. Appy today and let’s go to great places together! Cover\-More Services Limited is regulated by the Central Bank of Ireland and authorised by the Financial Conduct Authority for UK Business.

title: Veterinary Nurse - Graduate / Junior position
description: **Registered Veterinary Nurse – Graduate / Junior position** **Fairview Veterinary Hospital, Dublin 3 Part\-time or Full\-time \| Permanent Salary €30,000–€32,000 DOE (FTE) Start date August 2026 with flexibility** **Start Your Nursing Career with Confidence** Your first role should be something to look forward to. At Fairview Veterinary Hospital, we’ve built a supportive, friendly environment where graduate and junior nurses can grow without feeling overwhelmed. From day one, you’ll be guided by a team that understands what starting out is like. You’ll be encouraged to ask questions, build your confidence, and take on new experiences at a pace that works for you. This is a place where you will feel supported, not just trained. **Learn, Grow and Get Hands\-On** You’ll gain real experience in a busy small animal practice where nursing is highly valued. Every day brings something different, giving you the chance to develop practical skills across all areas of clinical nursing. You’ll be involved in consults, inpatient care, anaesthesia, and surgical support including orthopaedics. It’s a well\-rounded role designed to give you a strong foundation early in your career. If you enjoy variety, learning in practice, and making a genuine difference to patients and their owners, you will thrive here. **A Team You Will Enjoy Working With** Fairview Veterinary Hospital is a well\-established practice with a strong local reputation and a genuine community feel. You’ll join a small, welcoming team of 3 vets and 2 support staff who work closely together and support one another. There is a relaxed, respectful atmosphere and a strong focus on teamwork and balance. Flexible and part\-time working arrangements are already part of the team, helping create a positive environment day to day. The practice is open Monday to Friday from 9 am to 7 pm and Saturdays from 10 am to 2 pm. We are happy to tailor a schedule that works for you within these hours. **Who This Role Is Perfect For** This role is perfect for a graduate or junior nurse ready to build a strong start in practice. You do not need lots of experience. What matters most is your mindset and approach. We are looking for someone who is enthusiastic, keen to learn, and takes pride in delivering great patient care. Being a positive team player is key. You will need to be VCI registered or due to register in 2026\. **Support That Grows With You** We know how important your first few years are, which is why you will have access to our Graduate Nurse Academy. This provides structured learning, mentoring, and practical support to help you transition with confidence. You will also benefit from funded CPD, ongoing training, and the opportunity to explore areas of interest as your career develops. Whether you are still discovering what you enjoy most or already have a path in mind, we will support you along the way. **What You’ll Get In Return** We believe in supporting our people both professionally and personally. Alongside your salary, you will receive: **Work life balance** * 22 days annual leave entitlement * Birthday leave **Focus on employee wellbeing** * Paid Maternity, Paternity and Adoptive leave packages * Cycle to work scheme * EAP and wellbeing centre access * Paid bereavement leave * Company sick pay **Development** * €600 annual CPD allowance with 3 days paid (pro\-rata) * Bespoke Graduate Nurse Academy, Nurse Evolve and many more in\-house academies * Funding of any Certificates / Diplomas / PhD’s you may want to pursue * Leadership Academy for all future leaders, including Head Nurses and Practice Managers * Career progression opportunities **Professional memberships** * VCI membership paid * VDS cover paid **Additional Benefits** * Annual pay reviews * Pawesome benefits – various discounts including retails and virtual gym * Employee pension contributions * Discounted staff pet veterinary fees * Relocation packages * Free flu jabs * Opportunity to join company programmes (LGBTQIA\+, Wellbeing Champions, Clinical Board and many more) **More Than Just Your First Job** This is more than a starting point. It is a place where you can build confidence, develop real clinical skills, and enjoy being part of a supportive team. If you are looking for a role where you will be encouraged, valued, and given the chance to grow, we would love to hear from you. €0 \- €32,000 a year Up to €32,000 DOE FTE We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Veterinary Nurse - Graduate / Junior position
description: **Registered Veterinary Nurse – Graduate / Junior position** ------------------------------------------------------------ ***Fairview Veterinary Hospital, Dublin 3*** ***Part\-time or Full\-time \\u007C Permanent*** ***Salary €30,000–€32,000 DOE (FTE)*** ***Start date August 2026 with flexibility*** ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- ### **Start Your Nursing Career with Confidence** Your first role should be something to look forward to. At Fairview Veterinary Hospital, we’ve built a supportive, friendly environment where graduate and junior nurses can grow without feeling overwhelmed. From day one, you’ll be guided by a team that understands what starting out is like. You’ll be encouraged to ask questions, build your confidence, and take on new experiences at a pace that works for you. This is a place where you will feel supported, not just trained. ### **Learn, Grow and Get Hands\-On** You’ll gain real experience in a busy small animal practice where nursing is highly valued. Every day brings something different, giving you the chance to develop practical skills across all areas of clinical nursing. You’ll be involved in consults, inpatient care, anaesthesia, and surgical support including orthopaedics. It’s a well\-rounded role designed to give you a strong foundation early in your career. If you enjoy variety, learning in practice, and making a genuine difference to patients and their owners, you will thrive here. ### **A Team You Will Enjoy Working With** Fairview Veterinary Hospital is a well\-established practice with a strong local reputation and a genuine community feel. You’ll join a small, welcoming team of 3 vets and 2 support staff who work closely together and support one another. There is a relaxed, respectful atmosphere and a strong focus on teamwork and balance. Flexible and part\-time working arrangements are already part of the team, helping create a positive environment day to day. The practice is open Monday to Friday from 9 am to 7 pm and Saturdays from 10 am to 2 pm. We are happy to tailor a schedule that works for you within these hours. ### **Who This Role Is Perfect For** This role is perfect for a graduate or junior nurse ready to build a strong start in practice. You do not need lots of experience. What matters most is your mindset and approach. We are looking for someone who is enthusiastic, keen to learn, and takes pride in delivering great patient care. Being a positive team player is key. You will need to be VCI registered or due to register in 2026\. ### **Support That Grows With You** We know how important your first few years are, which is why you will have access to our Graduate Nurse Academy. This provides structured learning, mentoring, and practical support to help you transition with confidence. You will also benefit from funded CPD, ongoing training, and the opportunity to explore areas of interest as your career develops. Whether you are still discovering what you enjoy most or already have a path in mind, we will support you along the way. ### **What You’ll Get in Return** We believe in supporting our people both professionally and personally. Alongside your salary, you will receive: #### **Work life balance** * 22 days annual leave entitlement * Birthday leave #### **Focus on employee wellbeing** * Paid Maternity, Paternity and Adoptive leave packages * Cycle to work scheme * EAP and wellbeing centre access * Paid bereavement leave * Company sick pay #### **Development** * €600 annual CPD allowance with 3 days paid (pro\-rata) * Bespoke Graduate Nurse Academy, Nurse Evolve and many more in\-house academies * Funding of any Certificates / Diplomas / PhD’s you may want to pursue * Leadership Academy for all future leaders, including Head Nurses and Practice Managers * Career progression opportunities #### **Professional memberships** * VCI membership paid * VDS cover paid #### **Additional benefits** * Annual pay reviews * Pawesome benefits – various discounts including retails and virtual gym * Employee pension contributions * Discounted staff pet veterinary fees * Relocation packages * Free flu jabs * Opportunity to join company programmes (LGBTQIA\+, Wellbeing Champions, Clinical Board and many more) ### **More Than Just Your First Job** This is more than a starting point. It is a place where you can build confidence, develop real clinical skills, and enjoy being part of a supportive team. If you are looking for a role where you will be encouraged, valued, and given the chance to grow, we would love to hear from you. Up to €32,000 DOE FTE We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. title: Waiter/Waitress
description: Where those who love pizza can be their true self. Benefits: * Free Food on shift * Plus Tips \- You'll receive tips/Tronc\* * 50% off food and drink when you’re not working * Wellbeing Support for you and your family * Referral Bonus of €450 for referring pizza chefs and €1150 for referring managers * Pension \& Life Assurance * Pay Rate is €13 for under 20s and €14\.15 for age 20 and over * Learning and Development Opportunities to invest in you You’ll be dedicated to delivering top\-notch service creating enlivening experiences that exceed expectations. Be yourself, bring your personality, and let every day be an opportunity to express your unique flair. No experience required. What you’ll do: * Greet and seat customers * Take orders and serve food, drink and desserts * Work in a dynamic and energetic environment Who we are: Where those who love pizza can be their true self. We’ve been around since 1965, bringing pizza to the UK and have since grown to a multichannel, international brand. Our people are at the heart of our success and everything we do; we believe you should always be able to express yourself. Here you can be yourself. Inclusivity and respect are at the heart of our business and are valued by our teams, customers, and suppliers. PizzaExpress and Milano is a place where everyone is welcome, and everyone belongs. That’s why we assess each application on the aptitude to do the job and nothing else. If you are invited to an interview, please let your interviewer know at the time of booking if you require any reasonable adjustments to be made for you. * Tronc, or card gratuities, is a fair way to pay gratuities to our teams. All Tronc goes to you, shared between our waiting and our non\-waiting teams. You’ll get this at the end of each pay period, along with your normal pay and it’s one of the best perks about working in hospitality.
